user.title: Configure FileTrack
user.description: FileTrack will be activated immediately. Use the config menu to add or remove sensors.

abort.already_configured: FileTrack is already added. Use the config menu to add sensors

remove_sensor.title: Remove FileTrack sensors
remove_sensor.description: Select the sensor(s) you wish to remove.

confirm.title: Confirmation
confirm.description:
You are about to permanently remove the following sensor(s):

**{names}**

Are you sure?

abort.no_sensors: There are no sensors to remove.
